title: 'You are digital, fast, and efficient,' Commissioner Zaharieva tells Baltic audience during landmark visit to the region - The Baltic Times
summary_full: 'You are digital, fast, and efficient,' Commissioner Zaharieva tells Baltic audience during landmark visit to the region  The Baltic TimesBaiba Braže discusses the EU Multiannual Financial Framework and Latvia’s priorities for economic growth and innovation during a meeting with EC Commissioner Ekaterina Zaharieva  Ārlietu ministrija"TechChill" and the first Baltic startup policy forum – already this week  Labs of Latvia
